## #13907
- added: 2018-04-06 13:58:59

1. Be direct with project needs. Do not fear to challenge your team as long as you care deeply about their welfare.\n2. When successes occur, lavish your team with praise and give them credit for everything — without them success is impossible.

## #13906
- added: 2018-04-06 13:42:25

sincere empathy, crystal clear communication, and technical excellence
